Lisbon → Madrid → Barcelona → Southern France → Northern Italy → Balkans → Istanbul → Ankara → Tehran → Islamabad → Delhi → Kolkata → Dhaka → Yangon → Bangkok → Kuala Lumpur → Singapore

| Urban navigation (10+ major cities) | ~1,500 km | ~0.55 | ~825 |

- Left/right turns assumed roughly **equal** on non-highway segments
- Gradual highway curves (<45°) are excluded

---

### Final Estimate

$$\approx 3{,}500 \text{ significant left turns}$$
